description: Create a strategic Wardley Map for a fintech cloud migration strategy based on the specification in '~/Desktop/cloud_migration_strategy.txt' using the template in '~/Diagrams/wardley_map.drawio'. The map must include 18 technology components positioned by Evolution (X) and Value Chain (Y), dependency links, and 6 evolution arrows showing planned migration paths. Components should be color-coded by category (User-Facing: Blue #4A90D9, Business Logic: Green #7AB648, Platform: Orange #F5A623, Data: Purple #9B59B6) with a corresponding legend. Include the 3 strategic annotations mentioned in the specification and export the final map as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/wardley_map_cloud_migration.pdf'.
